commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Paul makes it clear that he has written the subscript with his own hand. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Didymus the Blind
commentaries.content: To avoid any suspicion of forgery, Paul signs the letter with his own hand. .

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: The salutation of me Paul with my own hand; intimates that the Epistle was composed with great seriousness;

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
